name: Scottish Hot Cross Buns
recipeInstructions:
1. Make the yeast mixture by combining all ingredients and setting it aside to proof (foam).
2. In a separate bowl, sift together flour, salt, spices, and sugar. Add fruits and mix well.
3. Combine butter and egg, then add to the yeast mixture. Mix in until combined.
4. Gradually add to the flour mixture, kneading on a floured surface for 8-10 minutes or until smooth and elastic. Add more flour if needed to prevent sticking.
5. Divide into 12 equal pieces and shape into round buns. Place rolls far apart on a greased baking sheet. Cover and let rise at room temperature for 45 minutes.
6. Use a sharp knife to make an X-shaped cut on the surface of each dough.
7. Bake in a preheated oven at 425°F (220°C) for 15-20 minutes, or until golden brown.
8. Cool on a rack.
9. Make glaze by bringing ingredients to a boil in a small saucepan for 2 minutes. Brush glaze over buns thoroughly.
